ability.en: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller to learn 2 things in private: 1 is true & 1 is false.
ability.es-419: Cada día, puedes visitar al Narrador para aprender 2 cosas en privado: 1 es verdadera y 1 es falsa.
ability.sv: Varje dag får du prata med berättaren privat och få 2 påståenden: 1 sant och 1 falskt.
ability.zh-Hans: 每个白天，你可以私下询问说书人以得知两条信息：一个是正确的，一个是错误的。
ability.cn: 每个白天，你可以私下询问说书人以得知两条信息：一个是正确的，一个是错误的。

flavor_text.en: "Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor... the sun sets early but the moon is unchanged... a torn piece of cloth... evil in the manor house... three by three... the one we trusted is not what he seems... green light means magnesium... residue, but the pattern is wrong... Seventy-two matchsticks on the floor..."
flavor_text.es-419: Setenta y dos fósforos en el suelo…el sol se pone temprano, pero la luna sigue igual…un trozo de tela rasgado…maldad en la mansión…tres por tres…aquel en quien confiábamos no es lo que parece…la luz verde significa magnesio…residuos, pero el patrón es incorrecto…Setenta y dos fósforos en el suelo…
flavor_text.sv: Sjuttiotvå tändstickor på golvet… solen går ner tidigt, men månen är oförändrad… ett avslitet tygstycke… ondska på godset… tre gånger tre… den vi litade på är inte det han utger sig för… grönt ljus betyder magnesium… rester, men mönstret är fel… Sjuttiotvå tändstickor på golvet…
flavor_text.zh-Hans: 地上有七十二根火柴……今天的太阳落得更早，月亮还是按时升起……一块破布……庄园里的邪恶之物……三个又三个……我们相信的事物和他真正看到的不一样……绿光代表镁……残留物，但是图案不太对……地上有七十二根火柴……
flavor_text.cn: “地上有七十二根火柴……今天的太阳落得更早，月亮还是按时升起……一块破布……庄园里的邪恶之物……三个又三个……我们相信的事物和他真正看到的不一样……绿光代表镁……残留物，但是图案不太对……地上有七十二根火柴……”

how_to_run.cn:
每个白天仅限一次，如果博学者要求与你进行私聊，请和他一起离开玩家围成的圆圈，保证你们的私聊不会被偷听。然后以耳语的方式告知博学者一真一假两条信息。（如果你无法立刻想出两条信息，要么多想一会儿，要么让博学者几分钟后再来找你。）
保证你提供的信息有用并且与游戏有关。避免提供恶魔是谁这种信息，否则可能导致游戏快速结束。如果你无法决定告知博学者什么信息，你可以选择提供类似于镇民能力能够获取的信息。
how_to_run.en:
Once per day, if the Savant requests a private chat with you, take them away from the circle so you cannot be overheard. Whisper two pieces of information, one true and one false, to the Savant. (If you cannot think of two straight away, either take your time or ask them to come back in a few minutes.)
Keep the information you give helpful and related to the game. Avoid saying who exactly the Demon is, or it could be a very short game. If you need help on choosing what to say, give information similar to what Townsfolk abilities would provide.

cn: 博学者得知“所有戴眼镜的玩家都是善良的”以及“坐在黑色沙发上的玩家之一是爪牙”。
博学者得知“舞蛇人存在于游戏中”和“昨晚每个玩家都得到了真实的信息”。
博学者得知“恶魔是女性玩家”和“小八属于邪恶阵营”。
博学者得知“小文和小米属于同一个阵营”和“只有一名外来者在场”。
en: Keep the information you give helpful and related to the game. Avoid saying who exactly the Demon is, or it could be a very short game. If you need help on choosing what to say, give information similar to what Townsfolk abilities would provide.
The Savant learns that "All players wearing glasses are good" and that "One player sitting on the black couch is a Minion."
The Savant learns that "A Snake Charmer is in play" and "Everybody got true information last night."
The Savant learns that "The Demon is a woman" and "Benjamin is evil."
The Savant learns that "Evin and Amy are the same alignment" and "There is one Outsider in play."

cn: 在每天你可以得到一条真信息和一条假信息。最简单的运用方式就是选择一条你认为是真信息的然后去推理。例如，说书人告诉你a)有畸形秀演员在场b)你的邻座都是善良的，而现在没有证据表明畸形秀演员在场，那么你只需要假设你的邻座确实都是善良的。有可能这是错误的，但是你必须要做出一个"最好的假设"。
在某些情况下，你的其中一条信息会被证实是正确的，那么另一条就是错误的。或者其中一条被证实是错误，则另一条就会是正确的。这将为你让你得知大量信息。例如，如果你得知a)有一个金发玩家是爪牙b)有三个外来者在场，如果大量证据表明爪牙已经死去了（而死去的玩家中没有金发玩家），那么你可以大胆认为场上确实有三个外来者。
有些时候你可以尝试去验证你其中一条的真假，这同样会给你带来很多信息。例如，如果你得知a)恶魔穿着衬衫或b)坐在黑色沙发上的玩家都是善良的。那么你可以故意去处决所有穿着衬衫的玩家，而如果游戏仍然继续，恶魔仍然在夜里行动，那么你就知道恶魔没有穿衬衫，所以所有坐在黑色沙发上的玩家就都是善良的。
如果你能判断你哪条信息是错的，那么假信息就和真信息一样有用。当你在颠倒真假信息时，注意不要犯逻辑错误。例如，你得知"女巫昨晚选择了一名善良玩家"，如果你认为这条信息是错的，那么相反的信息并不一定是"女巫昨晚选择了一名邪恶玩家"，因为也许并没有女巫在场，又或者女巫已经死了。你唯一能够知道的是所有善良玩家昨晚都没有被女巫诅咒所以可以放心提名。

每一天你可以得到两条信息。要立刻分辨出哪一条是真信息可能不太容易，但随着游戏进行，你可以将后续的信息与之前的信息对比，从而得出具体的结论。例如，如果你在第一天得知a)有舞蛇人在场或b)所有戴帽子的玩家是善良的。然后在第三天，你得知a)有一个新的玩家在昨晚成为了恶魔b)爪牙已经死了，那么这些信息就有所交互。如果你假设恶魔已经被舞蛇人换了，那么你就可以推断至少有一个戴帽子的玩家是邪恶的，并且爪牙仍然还活着。
告诉大家你在每天得到的信息，可以让大家帮助你记住。一旦游戏不断推进，你可能很难记住说书人说的所有信息。毕竟，你需要成为一名真正的博学者！告诉大家你的信息以确保这些信息不会被遗忘。或者，如果你有很好的记忆力（或者你能悄悄的写下来，又或者说书人允许你写下来做记录），那么你可以保持低调，然后在后续一次性揭露你的爆炸信息。

为了获得更多信息，你需要尽可能的多活几天。你可以装作是那些恶魔不太愿意去攻击的对象，如：贤者、钟表匠或者已经使用能力的女裁缝等，或者你也可以保持沉默。你活的越久，你能得到的信息就越多。但是也不要藏的太久……你需要适当的早些告诉大家你的信息，来帮助大家处决邪恶玩家，否则由于女巫、洗脑师或者畸形秀演员等能力，你们之中会有越来越多的人死去。如果有镜像双子或者涡流在场，那么利用你的信息对大家进行纠正将会尤其的有用。

注意说书人使用的词汇——如果你做了小小的变更有可能会出现截然不同的结果。由于对说书人而言如果博学者在游戏中将会非常困难，因为他们需要编造一些对你有用但又不能对邪恶阵营太过不公平的信息，所以说书人通常会非常谨慎的给出信息。要准确的记住说书人给出的信息，以免产生混淆。例如，如果说书人说"所有爪牙都坐在蓝色沙发上"而你告诉大家"蓝色沙发上的玩家都是爪牙"，那么你就犯了一个逻辑错误。又或者，如果说书人说"恶魔戴着眼镜"，而你告诉大家"恶魔就是戴眼镜的人"，请注意，这里的说法略微不同——如果恶魔在你不注意的情况下摘下眼镜，而你一直告诉大家恶魔戴着眼镜，你就错了。
每一天都要去找说书人，以尽可能的获取更多的信息。随着你每天都去找说书人，你就会得到更多的信息，当然恶魔也更有可能去杀你。博学者对于恶魔而言是一个非常危险的角色，所以如果恶魔看见你在每天都去找说书人，那么即使你没有说明你自己的角色，恶魔也可能会在晚上攻击你。
你也可以在前期不去找说书人。这样会导致你获取更少的信息，但同时更容易存活。而你在当时获取的信息有可能会更有价值。在通常情况下，如果只有3、4、5名玩家存活时，你的信息会更有用，因为它会指向更少的玩家。例如，在12人存活时，得知两名玩家中有一个是爪牙是比较简单的，但是如果只有3个玩家存活，那就会变得非常简单。
en: Each day, you will receive one true piece of information, and one false piece of information. The easiest way to utilize this is to pick which piece of information you believe to be true, and run with it. For example, if the Storyteller tells you that either a) a Mutant is in-play, or b) both your neighbours are good, and there is no evidence that a Mutant is in-play, then just assume that both your neighbours are good. You might be wrong, but you've made a "best guess", which is something.

In some situations, one half of your information may be proved to be true, in which case, the other piece of information is false. Or, one half of your information is proved to be false, in which case the other half of your information must be true. This gives you multiple facts to work with. For example, if you learnt that either a) the Minion has blonde hair, or b) there are 3 Outsiders in play, and all evidence is pointing to the fact that the Minion is dead (and no dead players have blonde hair), you can safely assume that there are 3 Outsiders in play.

You can sometimes deliberately prove that one half of your information is true or false. Again, this gives you more facts as a result. For example, if you learn that either a) the Demon is wearing a collared shirt, or b) all players on the black couch are good. If you deliberately execute all players wearing collared shirts, and the game continues with the Demon still killing at night, then you know that the Demon was not wearing a collared shirt, and therefore that all players on the black couch are good.

False information is just as useful as true information, if you know it to be false. When mentally reversing a fact from false to true, be careful that you do not make a logical error. For example, if you learn that "the Witch chose a good player last night", and you come to believe that information is false, reversing this information to mean "the Witch chose an evil player last night" is not necessarily correct. There may be no Witch in play. Or the Witch might be dead. The reversal of "the Witch chose a good player last night" is "all good players are free from the Witch's curse and may safely nominate".

Each day, you will get two pieces of information. Whilst it may sometimes seem impossible to determine which of these pieces are true, as the game progresses, you can compare later information to earlier information, and this may lead to definite conclusions. For example, if on the 1st day, you learn that a) A Snake Charmer is in play, or b) all players wearing hats are good, then on the third day, you learn that either a) a new player became the Demon last night, or b) the Minion is dead; this information overlaps. If you assume that the Demon has been swapped by the Snake Charmer, you can deduce that at least one player wearing a hat was evil on day 1, and the Minion is still alive.

Tell the group your information each day so they can help you remember it all. It can be difficult to remember everything the Storyteller told you once the days start getting numerous. You need to be a Savant, after all! Telling the group can help make sure nothing is forgotten. Alternatively, if you have an excellent memory (or you can secretly write down the information without the storyteller catching you, or the Storyteller actually lets you write down information), staying quiet for a few days and revealing everything at once can be devastating.

To maximize the information that you receive, do whatever you can to survive as many days as possible. Bluff as a character that the Demon does not want to attack, such as the Sage, or the Clockmaker, or Seamstress, who has already used their ability, or simply stay quiet. The longer you survive, the more information you have to work with. Don't leave it too long though... with players dying left, right, and center, due to the Witch, Cerenovus, and Mutant, you may need to reveal your information earlier rather than later, to help the good team kill an evil player or two. This is particularly helpful if an Evil Twin or a Vortox is in-play, as you'll need to correct the good team's information with what you know.

Pay attention to the wording that the Storyteller uses - small changes can have drastically different consequences. Since the Savant can be a difficult character for Storytellers to have in a game, as they need to create information that is helpful to you, but not game-endingly unfair for the evil team, many Storytellers choose their words very carefully. Remember exactly what was said, to avoid confusion. For example, if the Storyteller says "All minions are on the blue couch", and you tell the group that "all players on the blue couch are minions", you have made a logical error. Or, if the Storyteller says "The Demon is wearing glasses", and you tell the group "The Demon is someone who wears glasses.", be aware that these statements are slightly different - if the Demon takes their glasses off without you noticing, and you keep telling the group that the Demon is wearing glasses, you will be in error.

Visit the Storyteller every day, to receive as much information as you can. The more days that you visit the Storyteller, the more you learn, but the more likely the Demon is to kill you at night. The Savant is often too dangerous a player for the Demon to keep alive, so if the Demon player sees you visiting the Storyteller each day, they may attack you at night, even if you have not publicly revealed that you are the Savant.

Wait a few days before visiting the Storyteller. While this will mean that you get less information overall, it may mean that you live longer and that any information that you do receive is more valuable. Typically, information you get when there are only 3, 4, or 5 players left alive will be more useful, because it refers to fewer players. For example, learning that 1 of 2 players is a Minion is handy when 12 players are alive, but it is VERY handy when just 3 players are alive.
